SARAJEVO, Bosnia-Herzegovina (AP) U.S. Embassy Bosnian journalists have expressed outrage after unknown assailants attacked seriously hurt reporter independent Bosnian Serb television station.
BNTV reporter Vladimir Kovacevic been hospitalized following attack assailants late Sunday outside home Banja Luka, main town Serb-run part Bosnia.
Kovacevic posted photo Twitter showing bloodied bandaged head.
said that attacked with metal bars coming home after reporting from anti-government rally.
BNTV faced criticism from Bosnian Serb authorities independent editorial policies.
U.S. Embassy tweeted Monday that attacks journalists "unacceptable."
Bosnian journalists' association says attack aimed intimidating independent media.

EXCLUSIVE: Actor comedian Joel McHale signed with Anonymous Content representation.
Previously with WME, McHale perhaps best known starring Jeff Winger seasons NBC/Yahoo comedy Community spent twelve seasons host E!
's satirical series Soup.
Most recently, toplined CBS's short-lived sitcom Great Indoors.
McHale will next seen Netflix biopic Futile Stupid Gesture, portraying former Community co-star Chevy Chase, Levinson's upcoming thriller Assassination Nation.
Other credits include Merry Friggin' Christmas, where played Robin Williams' son, Jerry supernatural thriller Deliver From Evil, Warner Bros' rom-com Blended, Seth MacFarlane's blockbuster comedy Ted.
